findings.finding_summary: Checker requires the CSV row schema and slot-to-window derivation to be duplicated in instruction.md even though the repo permits verifier-required behavior to live in solver-visible code stubs.
findings.waiver_reason: The input parser in environment/src/i8/parse.rs is solver-visible and defines the six CSV columns, the event id column, and the bucketed window derivation; adding those mechanics to the prompt would move the task away from the required symptoms-only style.

enforcing_rule.quote: either instruction.md states this relationship or a solver-visible code stub documents it
